entities.name: Generic AI Usage is Detectable and Disqualifying
entities.context: V's position that using AI tools with generic prompts produces recognizable, low-quality output that harms job candidates

entities.name: ChatGPT
entities.context: AI tool that produces recognizable generic output when used with simplistic prompts

entities.name: Garbage In Garbage Out
entities.context: Principle that limited context and simplistic prompts always yield generic, disqualifying content

entities.name: Sophisticated AI Usage
entities.context: Using AI with rich context and domain expertise to produce genuinely helpful output, contrasted with lazy generic usage

entities.name: AI-Automation
entities.context: Domain category for this position within V's knowledge system

entities.name: Recruiters
entities.context: Hiring professionals who can immediately spot generic AI-generated application content and disqualify candidates

relationships.from: Generic AI Usage is Detectable and Disqualifying

relationships.from: Generic AI Usage is Detectable and Disqualifying
relationships.context: Core principle underpinning the position — limited input yields generic output

relationships.from: Generic AI Usage is Detectable and Disqualifying
relationships.context: ChatGPT identified as the primary tool producing detectable generic output when misused

relationships.to: Generic AI Usage is Detectable and Disqualifying
relationships.context: Presented as the counter-approach — context-rich AI usage can help where generic usage harms
